lift.interpretation: Read the STRICT metrics (single_doc_both_tokens, derived_fact_hit_rate). Pre-dream both must be 0 by construction: no premise template puts both a_tok and b_tok in the same memory and no derived:* labels exist. Post-dream derived_fact_hit_rate > 0 is the unambiguous signal that the Insight phase materialised a synthesised memory AND retrieval surfaced it. The legacy *_both_tokens_rate fields use a collective top-k metric and saturate above ~0.9 even pre-dream — do not interpret them as evidence either way (legacy_collective_metric_inflated).
